(TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76 or -2322.23); may be negative. 

COMMENT: Service tracking claims (identified by claim types [CLM_TYPE_CD] 4, D, X) are not included in the TAF 
RIFs, but this variable is populated for non-service tracking claims as well.
